title: artemisia desertorum subsp. desertorum
intro: Artemisia desertorum subsp. desertorum, also known as Chinese wormwood, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chinese wormwood include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Chinese wormwood can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
